basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Manager and Sr. Project Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Manager and Sr. Project Manager
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Project Manager and Sr. Project Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Project Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA or Master's degree in related discipline, Post Graduate Degree
qualification.details: Sr. Project Manager: Preferably an MBA or a Master's degree in a related discipline with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade, with relevant 08 Years' experience in a similar role. Excellent communication skills of English (both spoken and written) along with strong presentation abilities. Strong presentation and interpersonal skills. Project Manager: First division in any Post Graduate Degree alongwith Undergraduate Degree with 60% marks. Excellent written and spoken communication skills. Good Knowledge of Excel, Powerpoint, and other professional tools. 08 years + work experience after completing PG Degree. Experience in handling placements of a reputed MBA college will be preferred.

selection_process: Short-listing of eligible candidates Offline Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Manager posts at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your completed application via email is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Manager position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Manager positions at IIT Delhi. These vacancies are for Sr. Project Manager and Project Manager roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Manager roles?
faq.answer: For Sr. Project Manager, an MBA or Master's degree in a related discipline with 55% marks and 8 years of experience is required. For Project Manager, a Post Graduate Degree with 60% marks and 8+ years of experience is needed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Manager positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Manager posts is 40 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Manager positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 64,260 to Rs. 1,01,610/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Manager posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial short-listing of eligible candidates followed by an offline interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Project Manager positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature. The project duration is specified to be up to 21st August 2036.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and apply through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also listed there.
